name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code, with integrated AI pair programming, inline editing, and chat capabilities

extraction.json_path: Electron-updater API — endpoint is BLOCKED externally. Known pattern: follow redirect on download URL to get versioned filename, or check update API response (returns JSON with version, url, etc.)

version_check.fallback: Follow redirect on https://cursor.com/downloads?platform=darwinUniversal to get version from filename pattern

notes: Electron-based app using electron-updater. The update API endpoint at cursor.com/api/download is blocked from external access (requires valid User-Agent/referrer). Version can be inferred by following the download redirect and parsing the versioned filename. Also available on Linux and Windows.
